chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4658 of 2019 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) For orders as to maintainability of this petition. 22.04.2021 Mr. Khan Muhammad Lakho, advocate. ************* Petitioner has approached this Court for appointment on deceased quota and in support of his contention, he relied upon the order dated 26.09.2018 passed by this Court and argued that appointment based on deceased quota under Rule 11-A of Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion & Transfer) Rules, 1974, he is entitled to such relief. Per learned counsel petitioner is qualified to be appointed against any post based on deceased quota in the respondent education department under the aforesaid provision of law; that he has been persistently pursuing the departmental hierarchy for his appointment of any suitable post on deceased quota but nothing has been done. He prayed for notice. To appreciate as to whether the case of the petitioner falls within the ambit of Rule 11-A of 1974 or otherwise, let notice be issued to the respondents as well as to learned AAG for 27.05.2021with direction to file comments. JUDGE JUDGE
